name: Prime Number Acquisition I Corp. Class A Common Stock
summary: Prime Number Acquisition I Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company's efforts to identify a target business will not be limited to a particular industry or geographic region, but it intends to focus on businesses operating in the technology and technology-enabled industries. The company is based in New York, NY.
